calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Mar-11-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:50am pausing at 10:09am resuming at 10:17am and concluding at 10:34am.

Plaintiff Sunbelt Rentals, Inc. appearing represented by Robert Coher, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Salinas Valleyh AG Monitoring LLC not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff CATHERINE HARGIS Corporate Collections Manager and she confirms statements made by counsel.

Plaintiff dismissed the Does on the record.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Sunbelt Rentals, Inc., and against Defendant Salinas Valley AG Monitoring LLC, as follows:

Damages: $46,011.57
Prejudgment Interest: $10,523.15
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $534.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $57,068.72

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
